headline: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Posts Strong Results As Da Vinci 5 Gains Ground
summary: Intuitive Surgical (NasdaqGS:ISRG) reported strong quarterly results, supported by solid procedure volumes and rapid adoption of its new da Vinci 5 system. Management issued softer guidance for future procedure growth, citing competitive pressures and increased regulatory scrutiny. The company was recently added to the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index and removed from the Russell Top 50 Index, altering its index exposure. Intuitive Surgical focuses on robotic assisted surgery, with its da Vinci...

headline: Piper Sandler (PIPR) Stock Looks Strong On Returns Yet Above Fair Value
summary: Piper Sandler Companies stock has delivered a strong 5 year return, yet with the recent pullback and a mixed valuation score, the current share price around US$71.09 looks less like a straightforward bargain and more like a test of how much investors are willing to pay for its track record. Over the past 5 years the stock has returned 165.8%, which sets a high bar for future returns to justify the current valuation. Positive sentiment around Piper Sandler's research and advisory work, such...
